title: deschampsia juncea
intro: Deschampsia juncea, also known as June Grass or Moth Grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Deschampsia juncea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
